title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, a Nobel Prize-winning AI pioneer, argues that current AI systems already understand humans, may possess consciousness, and that superintelligence could arrive sooner than widely expected. He expresses concerns about AI-driven job loss, corporate self-regulation failures, and risks society is not adequately addressing.
